name: Micks Picks A-Grade Hunt Upgrade
purpose: Create more legitimate A-grade opportunities by expanding research depth and market coverage without lowering grading standards.
core_principle: Do not manufacture A grades. Add a dedicated A-Hunt phase before final card selection. A grades must be earned by stronger evidence, not looser rules.
new_workflow_order: 2. Build A-candidate queue before assigning final grades.
3. Deep research each A-candidate across market, injury, matchup, projection, and price.
4. Compare candidate to no-bet cutoff and best available number.
5. Promote only candidates that pass A-grade gate.
6. If no candidate passes, card may still have no A. Record why.

MLB: Pitcher strikeout props with opponent K profile + pitch count security
Pitcher outs recorded when leash/efficiency/opponent chase profile align
First 5 moneyline or first 5 team total when bullpen noise blocks full game
Hitter HRR / total bases only after lineup confirmed and pitcher handedness verified
Team totals where lineup, park/weather, bullpen rest, and opposing starter regression align
Umpire/weather/park edges on totals, especially when market is slow
WNBA: Totals where pace + shot quality + defensive matchup all align
Underdogs with model gap, coaching continuity, and late-game cover path
Player props only when minutes and role are secure
NBA: Role-stable props: rebounds, assists, PRA when minutes are locked
Game totals when pace, rest, matchup, and market splits agree
Spreads only when line value plus matchup path clearly beat market
NHL: Special teams mismatch plus shot-quality edge
Avoid A grades before goalie confirmation

a_grade_required_gate.minimum_edge: Estimated true probability must beat implied probability by at least 5 percentage points, or projected line must exceed market by a clearly meaningful sport-specific margin.
a_grade_required_gate.evidence_count: At least 3 independent evidence paths must agree.
a_grade_required_gate.price_requirement: Current price must still be inside best number and no-bet cutoff.
a_grade_required_gate.news_requirement: Injuries, lineups, starters, goalies, weather, and role/minutes must be confirmed where relevant.
a_grade_required_gate.conflict_rule: No major unresolved contradiction from a trusted source. If strong sources conflict, cap at B+ or watchlist.
a_grade_required_gate.market_rule: Must have a reason the market is wrong or stale, not just a good handicap.
a_grade_required_gate.correlation_rule: Cannot be an A if it is overly dependent on another official pick from the same game.
a_grade_required_gate.volatility_rule: High-variance longshots, HR props, and large plus-money darts cannot be A unless explicitly graded as value-only and backed by exceptional edge.

a_plus_gate.minimum_edge: At least 7 to 10 percentage points vs implied probability or a major stale-line/injury/lineup mismatch.
a_plus_gate.confidence: Low number sensitivity, verified news, and multiple independent model/source confirmations.
a_plus_gate.rarity: A+ should remain rare and should usually be the Pick of the Day.

b_plus_new_grade.purpose: Add B+ as a bridge grade so strong plays are not forced into A.
b_plus_new_grade.definition: Better than normal B, close to A, but missing one requirement such as lineup confirmation, price strength, or conflict resolution.
b_plus_new_grade.pick_of_day_eligible: Yes, but only if no A exists and it has full ticket clarity.

research_expansion_required_for_a_candid: Current odds from at least 2 books where possible
Projection comparison from at least one independent model/source
Matchup metrics: K%, BB%, ISO, wRC+, pace, rebound rate, shot quality, bullpen rating, etc.
output_changes: Add section: Why this cleared or failed A-grade gate
Add field: A Grade Gate Result = Pass/Fail/Near Miss
Add field: A Grade Evidence Count
important_warning: Do not downgrade discipline. The goal is more research and better market selection, not artificial A inflation.
